title: Bare Bones x Fresh Animations
description: A Recource pack that makes Bare Bones compatible with Fresh Animations
body:
REQUIRES ENTITY MODEL FEATURES! (Mod)

Bare Bones (Resource Pack)

Fresh Animations (Resource Pack)

Description

A Resource pack that makes Bare Bones compatible with Fresh Animations

What is Bare Bones?

Bare Bones is a resource pack with the purpose of bringing your world and the default Minecraft textures to it's 'bare bones'. It is a simplistic and vibrant pack that is fun to use and makes your own Minecraft worlds look colourful!

What is Fresh Animations?

Fresh Animations is a work in progress resource pack that gives an overhaul to entity animations in the default look of Minecraft.

The aim is to make the mobs more dynamic and believable. Inspiration taken from Minecraft Dungeons and Minecraft cinematic trailers.

Why do I need this pack?

The creator of Fresh Animations explains why here:

![Why do I need to use this pack? ](https://i.imgur.com/4wjAVyp.png)

How To Use

make sure the textures packs are in the right order shown by the image below:

![Load order](https://i.imgur.com/zX50I7A.png)

If there are any issues please let me know in the discord server!
